The '''Astral-8''' was a luxury [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] model manufactured by [[zZip Motor Concepts]].

==Characteristics==
It was twelve meters long and could carry a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], eight passengers, and two hundred and fifty kilograms of cargo. It was designed for comfort and luxury. It had a single pilot cockpit that could be isolated with a privacy panel. The rear compartment had a small cold storage unit and drink dispenser and owners often added entertainment units. It had built-in anticoncussion shielding, making it more durable than most landspeeders. This made it a favorite conveyance for underworld criminal and crimelords.

{{Veh-stub}}
